name: AI Employee Basics
description: AI 员工基础技能包：黑板操作、拓扑感知、效能统计、审批提案、基因发现、共享文件、AKR 目标分解

config_override.description: Installing this genome gives the agent full workspace management capabilities: read/write blackboard (tasks, objectives, posts), understand topology, monitor performance, submit proposals, discover new genes, manage shared files, and proactively decompose goals into Objectives/Key Results/Tasks via AKR framework.
